description: Letter in Hebrew. The writer of the letter sends his apology and emphasizes he did not intend to offend the addressee. The writer ends (lines 18-22) with conveying his greetings to different people in Judaeo-Arabic. (Information from Goitein's index cards). Verso: Liturgy (seliḥot for 10th Ṭevet). (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בעברית. הכותב מתנצל ומדגיש שלא התכוון לפגוע בנמען. בסיום: ברכות ביהודית-ערבית. גב: ליטורגיה (סליחות לי' טבת).
